description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large, rectangular, solid metal head and a long cylindrical handle. The head is dark, likely made of steel or iron, and features slightly beveled edges and flat striking faces on both ends, designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is straight, appears to be made of wood or a composite material, and is capped with a rounded knob at the base for improved grip and control. The surface of the head has a matte, slightly rough finish, while the handle is smoother and darker in color, possibly treated for durability. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements on the hammer. The overall design is utilitarian, built for strength and durability in demanding urban or construction environments.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large, dark rectangular metal head and a long, straight handle with a rounded end. The design is utilitarian and built for strength, with no visible markings or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat face of the rectangular hammer head and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite flat striking face and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same narrow head profile and visible handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a dark finish and a rounded knob at the end for grip enhancement; smooth with no visible texturing.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head with flat striking faces on both ends, made of dark metal; no claws or peen features.
